steps: Isolate PMN according to the protocol PMN-01a for buffy coats or PMN-01b for fresh whole blood.

Resuspend PMN at 1x10 6 cells/ml in RPMI 1640 medium supplemented with 10% Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) and 1% penicillin/streptomycin ( SOLUTION- 13 ). SOLUTION- 13 - Complete culture medium by Farmacologia Medica

Add 250 µL of cell suspension per well in a 96-well round bottom plate and incubate for 24:00:00 alone or in the presence of the test substance at 37 °C in a 5% CO 2 atmosphere. Cells must be plated in duplicate for each experimental condition.
Centrifuge at 1400 x g, °C, 5 minutes and discard the supernatant. Allegra AVANTI 30 (Centrifuge, Beckman Coulter, Beckman Italy)
Resuspend cells with 200 µL of MTT solution at 0.5 mg/ml , incubate for 02:00:00 at 37 °C in a 5% CO 2 atmosphere.
Centrifuge at 1400 x g, °C, 5 minutes and discard the supernatant. Allegra AVANTI 30 (Centrifuge, Beckman Coulter, Beckman Italy)
Add 120 µL of DMSO per well, mix the plate until the formazan crystals are dissolved.
Read the plate on the ELISA plate reader at 570 nm.
creator: Farmacologia Medica
